entries.key: Build a Simple Car
entries.value: 制作一辆简单汽车

entries.key: Build Your First Plane
entries.value: 制作你的第一架飞机

entries.key: DESIGNER TUTORIALS
entries.value: 设计器教程

entries.key: Designer Basics
entries.value: 设计器基础

entries.key: Designer Environment
entries.value: 设计器光照环境

entries.key: Designer Tutorials
entries.value: 设计器教程

entries.key: Download Craft
entries.value: 下载作品

entries.key: MENU
entries.value: 菜单

entries.key: PARTS
entries.value: 零件库

entries.key: Please enjoy our hand-crafted, organic, interactive tutorials.
entries.value: 请体验我们精心制作的交互式教程。

entries.key: Quick intro to cars and working with the new powertrain system
entries.value: 快速了解汽车制作，以及新的动力传动系统。

entries.key: Quick walkthrough on how to build a working prop plane
entries.value: 快速带你完成一架可正常飞行的螺旋桨飞机。

entries.key: Start Tutorial
entries.value: 开始教程

entries.key: Super quick tutorial that teaches the basics of working in the designer
entries.value: 一份超简短教程，带你快速掌握设计器的基础操作。

entries.key: Undo History
entries.value: 撤销历史

entries.key: Upload Craft
entries.value: 上传作品

entries.key: Welcome to the SimplePlanes 2 Designer! Let's start with some camera basics.
entries.value: 欢迎来到 SimplePlanes 2 设计器！我们先从基础镜头操作开始。

entries.key: You can rotate the view around by clicking and dragging. Go ahead and try, just try not to click on any parts.
entries.value: 按住鼠标左键并拖动即可旋转视角。试试看，不过尽量别点到任何零件。

entries.key: Click the indicated button to open the tool list.
entries.value: 点击标出的按钮，打开工具列表。

entries.key: This shows your active tool. Click it to see more tools.
entries.value: 这里显示当前正在使用的工具。点击它可以查看更多工具。

entries.key: Select the View Tool.
entries.value: 选择查看工具。

entries.key: Click the indicated button to activate the view tool.
entries.value: 点击标出的按钮，启用查看工具。

entries.key: The View Tool - move around and inspect your craft without accidentally grabbing anything.
entries.value: 查看工具：用于移动视角并检查载具，不会误抓取任何零件。

entries.key: Look at the flashing button at the top right. This shows the list of parts you can add to your craft.
entries.value: 看右上角正在闪烁的按钮。这里会显示可添加到载具上的零件列表。

entries.key: Some buttons only appear when a part is selected. Click the indicated part to continue.
entries.value: 有些按钮只有选中零件后才会出现。点击标出的零件继续。

entries.key: Select the indicated part to continue.
entries.value: 选择标出的零件继续。

entries.key: This button opens Part Properties for the selected part. SP2 parts are highly customizable and this is where you dig in.
entries.value: 这个按钮会打开所选零件的属性。SP2 的零件可自定义程度很高，深入调整都在这里。

entries.key: This button enables/disables symmetry, which automatically mirrors your work to the other side of the craft. It's really nice and a big time saver.
entries.value: 这个按钮用于开启或关闭对称。开启后，你的操作会自动镜像到载具另一侧，非常好用，也很省时间。

entries.key: Select the Move Tool.
entries.value: 选择移动工具。

entries.key: Click the indicated button to activate the move part tool.
entries.value: 点击标出的按钮，启用移动零件工具。

entries.key: The Move Tool - your most-used tool by a mile. Click and drag parts to reposition and connect them to your craft.
entries.value: 移动工具：这是你最常用的工具。点击并拖动零件，即可重新定位并连接到载具上。

entries.key: Select the Rotate Tool.
entries.value: 选择旋转工具。

entries.key: Click the indicated button to activate the rotate tool.
entries.value: 点击标出的按钮，启用旋转工具。

entries.key: The Rotate Tool - for precise part rotation without breaking part connections.
entries.value: 旋转工具：用于精确旋转零件，且不会断开零件连接。

entries.key: Select the Translate Tool.
entries.value: 选择平移工具。

entries.key: Click the indicated button to activate the translate tool.
entries.value: 点击标出的按钮，启用平移工具。

entries.key: The Translate Tool - moves a part without disturbing its part connections. Handy for fine adjustments.
entries.value: 平移工具：在不影响零件连接的情况下移动零件，适合做细微调整。

entries.key: This button opens the paint panel where you can customize the colors and textures of your craft.
entries.value: 这个按钮会打开喷涂面板，你可以在这里自定义载具的颜色和纹理。

entries.key: This button opens the Search Parts panel where you can easily find parts in your craft and toggle their visibility.
entries.value: 这个按钮会打开搜索零件面板，你可以快速查找载具上的零件，并切换它们的可见性。

entries.key: Pro tip: You can right-click and drag a part to clone it. It's a big time saver!
entries.value: 小技巧：按住右键拖动零件可以克隆它，非常省时间！

entries.key: That's it for the designer basics! We recommend trying the Build Your First Plane tutorial next.
entries.value: 设计器基础教程到这里就结束了！接下来建议尝试“制作你的第一架飞机”教程。

entries.key: Next
entries.value: 下一步

entries.key: Skip this step
entries.value: 跳过此步骤

entries.key: 0% complete.
entries.value: 完成度 0%。

entries.key: The designer has many buttons. Don't worry, we'll just hit the highlights.
entries.value: 设计器里有很多按钮。别担心，我们只介绍重点功能。

entries.key: Click here to\nde-select part
entries.value: 点击此处\n取消选择零件

entries.key: That's it, you got it! Keep rotating.
entries.value: 对，就是这样！继续旋转。

entries.key: Let's start with the body of the aircraft, also known as its fuselage.
entries.value: 我们先从飞机的主体开始，也就是机身。

entries.key: Click the 'Add Parts' button to open the parts list.
entries.value: 点击“添加零件”按钮，打开零件列表。

entries.key: Select the 'Structure' category in the part list flyout on the left.
entries.value: 在左侧零件列表弹出面板中选择“结构件”分类。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Fuselage' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“机身”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Now drag and drop this part on to the craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 现在把这个零件拖放到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Click the 'Part Properties' button to open the part property options for this part.
entries.value: 点击“零件属性”按钮，打开该零件的属性选项。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Height' property to '1.1'.
entries.value: 将“高度”属性的值改为“1.1”。

entries.key: Add another fuselage using the 'Add Section' button.
entries.value: 使用“添加截面”按钮再添加一段机身。

entries.key: Click the 'Add Section' button to add a new section to the end of this fuselage
entries.value: 点击“添加截面”按钮，在这段机身末端添加一个新截面。

entries.key: Stretch out the length.
entries.value: 把长度拉长。

entries.key: Adjust the length of the fuselage to match the indicated shape by clicking and dragging the blue arrow at the front of the fuselage.
entries.value: 点击并拖动机身前端的蓝色箭头，调整机身长度，使其匹配标示形状。

entries.key: Squeeze the sides in just slightly.
entries.value: 把两侧稍微收窄一点。

entries.key: Adjust the front width to match the indicated shape by clicking and dragging the red arrow at the front of the fuselage.
entries.value: 点击并拖动机身前端的红色箭头，调整前端宽度，使其匹配标示形状。

entries.key: Now for the nose. Add a section up front.
entries.value: 接下来做机鼻。在前方添加一个截面。

entries.key: Add one last section for the tip of the nose.
entries.value: 再添加最后一个截面，用来做机鼻尖端。

entries.key: Stubby noses are in this season. Shorten it up.
entries.value: 短粗机鼻现在很流行。把它缩短一点。

entries.key: Adjust the length of the fuselage to match the indicated shape by clicking and dragging the blue arrow at the back of the fuselage.
entries.value: 点击并拖动机身后端的蓝色箭头，调整机身长度，使其匹配标示形状。

entries.key: Taper the width down. We want it sleek, not chunky.
entries.value: 把宽度收窄。我们想要流线型，而不是一坨方块。

entries.key: Adjust the back width to match the indicated shape by clicking and dragging the red arrow at the back of the fuselage.
entries.value: 点击并拖动机身后端的红色箭头，调整后端宽度，使其匹配标示形状。

entries.key: Slope the top down.
entries.value: 把顶部压低成斜面。

entries.key: Adjust the back height to match the indicated shape by clicking and dragging the green arrow at the back of the fuselage.
entries.value: 点击并拖动机身后端的绿色箭头，调整后端高度，使其匹配标示形状。

entries.key: Stretch it out. Even virtual pilots appreciate decent legroom.
entries.value: 把它拉长一点。就算是虚拟飞行员，也会喜欢宽敞腿部空间。

entries.key: Add a seat for our pilot, Major Chad.
entries.value: 给我们的飞行员查德少校加一把座椅。

entries.key: Click the back button in the part list header to go back to the part categories, then select the 'Interiors' category.
entries.value: 点击零件列表标题栏中的返回按钮回到零件分类，然后选择“内饰”分类。

entries.key: Select the 'Interiors' category in the part list flyout on the left.
entries.value: 在左侧零件列表弹出面板中选择“内饰”分类。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Basic Seat' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“基础座椅”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: We need somewhere to stash the pilot. Carve out a hole for the cockpit.
entries.value: 我们需要给飞行员留个位置。切出一个座舱开口。

entries.key: Click the back button in the part list header to go back to the part categories, then select the 'Structure' category.
entries.value: 点击零件列表标题栏中的返回按钮回到零件分类，然后选择“结构件”分类。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Bay' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“舱体”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Cutting is another way to modify fuselage parts, allowing for unique shapes.
entries.value: 切割是修改机身零件的另一种方式，可以做出独特的形状。

entries.key: Select the 'Cutting' tab to modify the cutting properties of the fuselage.
entries.value: 选择“切割”选项卡，修改机身的切割属性。

entries.key: Change the Bottom cutting parameter to 50% using the indicated slider.
entries.value: 使用标出的滑块，将“底部”切割参数改为 50%。

entries.key: Hollow out the nose section so we can show off our engine to the world.
entries.value: 把机鼻截面掏空，好让全世界都看见我们的发动机。

entries.key: Select the indicated fuselage part.
entries.value: 选择标出的机身零件。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Hollow' property to 'Yes'.
entries.value: 将“空心”属性的值改为“是”。

entries.key: Widen the gap. Major Chad has broad shoulders.
entries.value: 把开口加宽一点。查德少校肩膀很宽。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Width' property to '0.7'.
entries.value: 将“宽度”属性的值改为“0.7”。

entries.key: Slap some wings on this tube so it can actually fly.
entries.value: 给这根管子装上机翼，这样它才真的能飞。

entries.key: Click the back button in the part list header to go back to the part categories, then select the 'Wings' category.
entries.value: 点击零件列表标题栏中的返回按钮回到零件分类，然后选择“机翼”分类。

entries.key: Select the 'Wings' category in the part list flyout on the left.
entries.value: 在左侧零件列表弹出面板中选择“机翼”分类。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Primary Wing' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“主翼”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Open the wing shape tool. This can be done by double clicking the part or it can be accessed via its part properties.
entries.value: 打开机翼形状工具。你可以双击零件打开，也可以通过零件属性进入。

entries.key: Use the arrows to adjust the wing's shape to match that of the indicated shape.
entries.value: 使用箭头调整机翼形状，使它匹配标示形状。

entries.key: Make the wings huge so it has plenty of lift.
entries.value: 把机翼做大一点，这样升力才够。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Fuel' property to '15%'.
entries.value: 将“燃油”属性的值改为“15%”。

entries.key: Fuel typically goes in the wings. Let's add some now so we don't forget. But not too much, fuel is heavy!
entries.value: 燃油通常放在机翼里。现在先加一点，免得忘了。不过别加太多，燃油很重！

entries.key: Add the horizontal stabilizer. These allow the aircraft to pitch up and down.
entries.value: 添加水平安定面。它能让飞机进行俯仰控制。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Horizontal Stabilizer' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“水平安定面”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Add a vertical stabilizer so we don't spin out like a frisbee.
entries.value: 添加垂直安定面，免得我们像飞盘一样打转。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Vertical Stabilizer' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“垂直安定面”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: We don't want this part mirrored. Click the symmetry button to turn it off. Shortcut: 'Ctrl + X'
entries.value: 这个零件不需要镜像。点击对称按钮将其关闭。快捷键：“Ctrl + X”

entries.key: We want this part mirrored. Click the symmetry button to turn it on. Shortcut: 'Ctrl + X'
entries.value: 这个零件需要镜像。点击对称按钮将其开启。快捷键：“Ctrl + X”

entries.key: Click empty space to deselect your part so we can toggle symmetry.
entries.value: 点击空白处取消选择零件，这样我们就能切换对称。

entries.key: Now let's bolt on a propeller engine.
entries.value: 现在装上一台螺旋桨发动机。

entries.key: Click the back button in the part list header to go back to the part categories, then select the 'Aircraft Propulsion' category.
entries.value: 点击零件列表标题栏中的返回按钮回到零件分类，然后选择“航空发动机”分类。

entries.key: Select the 'Aircraft Propulsion' category in the part list flyout on the left.
entries.value: 在左侧零件列表弹出面板中选择“航空发动机”分类。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Small Prop' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“小型螺旋桨发动机”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Let's make this engine a little more powerful.
entries.value: 我们把这台发动机调得更有力一点。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Cylinders' property to '6'.
entries.value: 将“气缸数”属性的值改为“6”。

entries.key: Add the landing gear here.
entries.value: 在这里添加起落架。

entries.key: Click the back button in the part list header to go back to the part categories, then select the 'Wheels' category.
entries.value: 点击零件列表标题栏中的返回按钮回到零件分类，然后选择“轮组与起落架”分类。

entries.key: Select the 'Wheels' category in the part list flyout on the left.
entries.value: 在左侧零件列表弹出面板中选择“轮组与起落架”分类。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Wing Gear' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“机翼起落架”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Add a tiny wheel in the back to keep the tail out of the dirt.
entries.value: 在后面加一个小轮子，免得机尾蹭到地上。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Fixed Gear' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“固定起落架”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Enable turning on the rear wheel to make it a little easier to get around on the runway.
entries.value: 开启后轮转向，让它在跑道上移动时更容易操控。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Turnable' property to 'Yes'.
entries.value: 将“可转向”属性的值改为“是”。

entries.key: Our hole cutting parts may be in our way for this step. Let's disable their outlines for now. First, click the indicated button to open the view panel.
entries.value: 这一阶段，切割开口的零件可能会挡住视线。我们先把它们的轮廓关掉。首先点击标出的按钮打开视图面板。

entries.key: Disable the hole cutting outlines by clicking the indicated button. You can also use the '/' key.
entries.value: 点击标出的按钮关闭开口切割轮廓。也可以按“/”键。

entries.key: Select the main section of the fuselage by clicking the 'Backwards' button. Alternatively, you can click on the middle of the part directly.
entries.value: 点击“向后”按钮选择机身主截面。你也可以直接点击零件中部。

entries.key: Select the main section of the fuselage by clicking the 'Forwards' button. Alternatively, you can click on the middle of the part directly.
entries.value: 点击“向前”按钮选择机身主截面。你也可以直接点击零件中部。

entries.key: Select the front of the fuselage by clicking the 'Forwards' button. Alternatively, you can click on the front of the part directly.
entries.value: 点击“向前”按钮选择机身前端。你也可以直接点击零件前端。

entries.key: Select the part to be modified.
entries.value: 选择要修改的零件。

entries.key: Shorten up this new tail section.
entries.value: 把这个新的尾部截面缩短一点。

entries.key: Squish the height down on the back face.
entries.value: 把后端面的高度压低。

entries.key: Pull it out just a tad.
entries.value: 把它稍微拉出来一点。

entries.key: Congrats! You built an airplane! You can take it for a test flight by clicking the Play button in the bottom right.
entries.value: 恭喜！你造出了一架飞机！点击右下角的播放按钮，就可以试飞了。

entries.key: Open the fuselage shape tool. This can be done by double clicking the part or it can be accessed via its part properties.
entries.value: 打开机身形状工具。你可以双击零件打开，也可以通过零件属性进入。

entries.key: Select the back of the fuselage by clicking the 'Backwards' button. Alternatively, you can click on the back of the part directly.
entries.value: 点击“向后”按钮选择机身后端。你也可以直接点击零件后端。

entries.key: We have a beautiful car body, but right now it's just a very expensive sled. We have some work to do.
entries.value: 车身很漂亮，但现在它只是一台很昂贵的雪橇。还有不少工作要做。

entries.key: We need to enable powertrain view for this step. First, click the indicated button to open the view panel.
entries.value: 这一步需要启用动力传动视图。首先点击标示按钮打开视图面板。

entries.key: Enable powertrain view by clicking the indicated button.
entries.value: 点击标示按钮启用动力传动视图。

entries.key: Click the back button in the part list header to go back to the part categories, then select the 'Engines' category.
entries.value: 点击零件列表标题栏中的返回按钮回到零件分类，然后选择“发动机”分类。

entries.key: Select the 'Engines' category in the part list flyout on the left.
entries.value: 在左侧零件列表弹出面板中选择“发动机”分类。

entries.key: Now a drive shaft to carry all that torque from the engine.
entries.value: 现在需要一根传动轴，把发动机的全部扭矩传出去。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Drive Shaft' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“传动轴”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Now connect the other end of the drive shaft to the wheel.
entries.value: 现在把传动轴的另一端连接到车轮上。

entries.key: Drag the end of the drive shaft to where the arrow is indicating.
entries.value: 将传动轴末端拖到箭头标示的位置。

entries.key: Add a transmission so the car can shift gears.
entries.value: 添加一个变速器，让汽车可以换挡。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Transmission' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“变速器”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Reduce the number of gears on this transmission to make it smaller and lighter.
entries.value: 减少这个变速器的挡位数，让它更小、更轻。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Number of Gears' property to '3'.
entries.value: 将“挡位数”属性的值改为“3”。

entries.key: Add a differential here. It splits the power coming from the main drive shaft so it can reach multiple wheels at once.
entries.value: 在这里添加一个差速器。它会分配来自主传动轴的动力，让动力可以同时传到多个车轮。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Differential' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“差速器”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Add another drive shaft here to carry the engine power from the differential to the rear wheel.
entries.value: 在这里再添加一根传动轴，把动力从差速器传到后轮。

entries.key: Now add a wheel. Nothing fancy, a Street Wheel will do just fine here.
entries.value: 现在添加一个车轮。不需要太花哨，公路车轮就很合适。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Street Wheel' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“公路车轮”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Another Street Wheel here.
entries.value: 这里再放一个公路车轮。

entries.key: Slap a wishbone suspension on the front.
entries.value: 给前部装上一个双叉臂悬挂。

entries.key: Click and drag the 'Double Wishbone' part from the part list and add it to your craft at the indicated position.
entries.value: 从零件列表中点击并拖动“双叉臂悬挂”零件，将它添加到载具上的标示位置。

entries.key: Increase the turning angle. Unless your daily commute is a perfectly straight line, you're going to want to steer.
entries.value: 增大转向角。除非你的通勤路线是一条完美的直线，否则你肯定需要转向。

entries.key: Change the value of the 'Turning Angle' property to '20'.
entries.value: 将“转向角”属性的值改为“20”。

entries.key: Typically cars have four wheels, so let's do the same at the back too.
entries.value: 汽车通常有四个轮子，所以后面也照样装上。

entries.key: Select the indicated part.
entries.value: 选择标示的零件。

entries.key: Congrats! You built a functional car. Click the Play button in the bottom right to take it for a spin!
entries.value: 恭喜！你造出了一辆能开的汽车。点击右下角的开始按钮，开出去兜一圈吧！
